concerns.text: Task T007 implements 'forgetting/decay mechanism' not authorized in spec.md FR/SC set. This is scope creep beyond the defined requirements (see spec.md FR-001 to FR-012).
Task T008 implements 'memory consolidation/CREB mechanism' not authorized in spec.md FR/SC set. This is scope creep beyond the defined requirements.
Task T015 implements 'precise cue-driven retrieval validation logic' not present in spec.md requirements. This adds unverified functionality outside the specification.

Task T030 incorrectly references FR-010 (error logging) for power-law fitting implementation. Power-law fitting should reference FR-004 (specialization index) or be unlinked as the spec does not explicitly mandate it.
FR-001 requires CLI flags (--context, --agents, --dataset) but no task explicitly covers CLI flag parsing implementation. T016 covers run_experiment.py but does not mention CLI flag handling.
